sections.heading: Electronics and luxury-style purchases
sections.content: Electronics and other high-resale categories often deserve closer review when paired with first-use device activity, cross-border spending, or unusually high amounts.

sections.heading: Travel and lodging merchants
sections.content: Travel merchants may represent valid customer behavior, especially when travel notice exists, but they still require review when a new device and high amount appear together.

sections.heading: Context-first interpretation
sections.content: Merchant category alone is not a fraud outcome. Analysts should combine category, device familiarity, country mismatch, and transaction velocity before escalating.
